name: citicoline (CDP-choline)
mechanism: Choline donor and cytidine-containing intermediate in phosphatidylcholine synthesis that supports acetylcholine precursor biology and membrane phospholipid turnover.
contraindications: Anticholinergic drugs (functional opposition to cholinergic support)
cholinergic drugs / acetylcholinesterase inhibitors (possible additive cholinergic effects).
summary: Choline donor and cytidine-containing intermediate in phosphatidylcholine synthesis that supports acetylcholine precursor biology and membrane phospholipid turnover.
description: Choline donor and cytidine-containing intermediate in phosphatidylcholine synthesis that supports acetylcholine precursor biology and membrane phospholipid turnover.
